items.NAME: 🐧 Penguin Quilt
items.TITLE: Wall Hanging
items.TEXT:
Penguin-themed wall hanging quilt
A 36×48" wall hanging featuring foundation paper-pieced penguin blocks with an aurora borealis background. Hand-quilted with walking-foot straight lines.

items.NAME: ⭐ Lone Star
items.TITLE: Bed Quilt
items.TEXT:
Lone Star bed quilt
A queen-sized Lone Star quilt using a gradient of 24 fabrics from deep navy to bright gold. Machine-quilted with free-motion feathers in the negative space.

items.NAME: 🎮 Pixel Art
items.TITLE: Lap Quilt
items.TEXT:
Pixel art lap quilt
A 60×72" lap quilt made from 1" squares arranged into classic video game sprites. Each pixel is an individually cut and sewn square — over 4,300 pieces total.
